title: マチカネフクキタル登場！

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
(Today, the stars have aligned. It's my super lucky
day. At least...)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: (That's what the gods are telling me, anyway!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Come take a look at this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My goodness! That tea stalk is standing straight
up! It was bold enough to break out of the teabag
and stick right out!
choice_data_list: Well would you look at that...
Well would you look at that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Pretty auspicious, don't you think?! This feels like
a premonition. Perhaps my day of destiny has
finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We can't sit around doing nothing. We must leave
right away to seek divine guidance at
you-know-where!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru, fortune aficionado, starts
running toward "you-know-where" as fast as she
can.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: O gods, please tell me. Is today the fated day?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Give me a sign! Jagalo, fragalo... Hoooh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I-I got it! Great fortune! That means... my time has
finally come, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The gods have imparted to me this message.
"Today is the day to set our sights on the Twinkle
Series!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it's time to get to work! With the moon
positioned in the east and the sun positioned in
the west, I'm positioned to make my debut!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is my chance to repay Shiraoki for all my
blessings!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki is the god who always appears
in my dreams! One that I'm ever so thankful for!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Take that unforgettable night a few years ago. I
couldn't decide whether or not to enroll at Tracen
Academy. Why, you ask?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Because I felt utterly useless compared to my
perfect big sister. But then, that fateful night...

text_block_list.name: Shiraoki
text_block_list.text:
Run, Matikanefukukitaru. Run, and a new path
will open.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That revelation is what ultimately brought me to
Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't bring myself to run at all until the great
Shiraoki gave me the courage to.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm! I know I'm not as talented as my
sister...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But nobody is as dedicated to the whims of good
luck as I am! In fact, good luck's all I have! Luck
and nothing but luck will get me to sweet, sweet
victory!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Everyone wishes they could win at some point,
right? So I might as well try conquering the
Twinkle Series on pure luck, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I knew you'd get me, Trainer! Your skills as
an empath make you a true understander!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's not waste such a beautiful day.
Shall we ring the bell and offer up our prayers
once more?
choice_data_list:
I pray that Matikanefukukitaru achieves great
success.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! My turn. Please, oh please!
Gods, Buddha, and the great Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please bring me happiness! I'll wait here patiently
for it, so whenever you're ready!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems adamant about leaving everything to
the supernatural... Nonetheless,
Matikanefukukitaru's Twinkle Series challenge
begins now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
First off is my debut. Pick a great race for me,
please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I nearly forgot. Try and make sure it's on the
most auspicious day of the year, or the prime day
for harvest. Only a super lucky day will do!
